title: T-092 — UI: TEC Sensory Evaluation screen (consumes T-084 read model)
prompt:
# T-092 — UI: TEC Sensory Evaluation screen (consumes T-084 read model)

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5, §17, prototypes/design/03-TECHNICAL-UX.md
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/spec-driven-screens.jsx:472-569` (`lab_results_log_screen` — sensory has no dedicated isolated prototype; reuse this read-model status-list layout-primitive + `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`).

## Goal
Build the Technical-owned Sensory Evaluation UI — the orphaned deferral that 01-npd punted here (npd T-071 schema + T-076 UI both re-owned by 03-technical; only the schema/contract task T-084 exists). This task gives the Sensory read model (required / pending / pass / fail / hold / not_required) an actual screen, and surfaces a read-only sensory status badge to NPD approval.

Consumes the T-084 Technical sensory read model ONLY — it does NOT add a new sensory write path and does NOT move NPD gate ownership into Technical. The screen shows per-product/project/work-order sensory evidence with the 5 required UI states; the NPD-facing surface is a read-only badge.

## Implementation contract
Read Server Component / Server Action through `withOrgContext` (org-scoped, RLS via app.current_org_id()) against the T-084 read model. No mocks/hardcode. Translate the spec-driven prototype scaffold to shadcn/ui; implement loading / empty / error / permission-denied / optimistic states. See acceptance_criteria + Risk red lines.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/sensory/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/sensory/_components/sensory-status-badge.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-sensory.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Any sensory WRITE path / external lab/sensory vendor integration (T-084 is read-only contract).
- Moving NPD gate ownership into Technical (NPD consumes the badge read-only).
- Sensory schema/contract itself (T-084 — must land first).

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the screen renders, when compared with the layout-primitive prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/spec-driven-screens.jsx:472-569` (`lab_results_log_screen` — the read-model status-list pattern reused for sensory: verdict pills + pass/fail visualization), then it satisfies structural parity, visual parity, and interaction parity against the PRD §0/§5/§17 sensory read-model layout (PRD/UX is canonical, prototype is layout-primitive only), and applies the Technical red-line overlay (FG not FA). Verified by RTL.
2. Given org policy requires sensory for a product, when the page loads via the T-084 read model, then required/pending/pass/fail/hold states render from REAL Supabase data (no mock).
3. Given sensory is not_required, when rendered, then the badge shows not_required and no fake Technical evidence is implied.
4. Given a fail/hold result, when rendered, then the SENSORIAL_BLOCKED reason is surfaced for downstream release guards.
5. Given a user without sensory read access, when on the page, then the permission-denied state renders (no data leak).
6. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + 5 UI states + read-model mapping (required/not_required/pass/fail/hold).
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-sensory.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not move NPD gate ownership into Technical — NPD consumes the badge read-only.
- Do not add a sensory write path or external lab/sensory vendor integration.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Layout-primitive anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/spec-driven-screens.jsx:472-569` (`lab_results_log_screen` read-model status-list pattern; sensory has no dedicated isolated prototype) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` + `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.

pipeline_inputs.description: Technical-owned Sensory Evaluation UI consuming the T-084 read model; surfaces required/pending/pass/fail/hold/not_required + a read-only NPD badge. Closes the orphaned 01-npd T-076 sensory-UI deferral (no owning impl task existed).
pipeline_inputs.details: 01-npd deferred BOTH T-071 (sensory schema) and T-076 (sensory UI) to 03-technical (01-npd STATUS lines 85, 90 — canonical owner = 03-technical). 03-technical owns the schema/contract via T-084 but it EXPLICITLY excludes UI ('schema/API contract and tests only; no UI/prototype implementation'). Without this task the sensory UI silently never gets built. Source proposal: _meta/runs/sidecar/proposed-tasks/plan-sensory-ui.md. This task consumes T-084 only (no new sensory write path) and keeps gate ownership in NPD (read-only badge to NPD approval).
out_of_scope: Any sensory WRITE path / external lab/sensory vendor integration (T-084 is read-only).
Moving NPD gate ownership into Technical (NPD consumes the badge read-only).

cross_module_dependencies.reason: 01-npd deferred the sensory UI here (canonical owner = 03-technical per 01-npd STATUS). 01-npd is the read consumer of the badge; this task fulfills that deferral.
01-npd deferred the sensory schema here too; 03-technical T-084 owns the schema/contract this UI consumes.
